meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

## [2.0.0] - 2024-02-15
This model is in status draft, as this is just the conversion of existing model from bamm to samm and not released model.
This version can still be considered for updates.

## [1.0.0] - 2023-03-20
### Added
- initial version of this model

### Changed
n/a

### Removed

nodes.label: remainingRunningDistance
nodes.description: Expected additional mileage for the vehicle or part might without failure.

nodes.label: mileage
nodes.description: Mileage of the vehicle respectively part at date of determination.

nodes.label: date
nodes.description: Date of determination.

nodes.label: operatingHours
nodes.description: Operating hours at determination.

nodes.label: determinationStatus
nodes.description: Remaining useful life is determined at a specific  date with  acording mileage and operating hours. This status should be stored to interpretate the calculated values remaingRunningDistance and RemainingOperatingHours.

nodes.label: remainingOperatingHours
nodes.description: Expected additional operation hours for the vehicle or part might without failure.

nodes.label: determinationLoaddataSource
nodes.description: The source of the load data used to determine the remaining useful life is stored for information/interpretation.

nodes.label: informationOriginLoadSpectrum
nodes.preferredName: information on origin of load spectrum
nodes.description: A load spectrum is used to calulated the damage and the expected remaining useful for similar further usage. Information on the source of the load spectrum is stored.

nodes.label: sourceLoadSpectrum
nodes.preferredName: link to origin of load spectrum
nodes.description: The link to the load spectrum used to determine the remaining useful life, if available.

nodes.label: RemainingMileage
nodes.description: Expected addition mileage

nodes.label: RemainingOperatingHoursCharacteristic
nodes.description: Expected additional operating hours

nodes.label: DeterminationStatus
nodes.description: Status describes the date when this aspect is filled, the according mileage and according operating hours.

nodes.label: LoaddataSource
nodes.description: Information on the origin of the used load spectrum. If available, the link to the load spectrum.

nodes.label: Mileage
nodes.description: Mileage of vehicle respectively part.

nodes.label: OperatingHoursCharacteristic
nodes.description: Operating hours for the vehicle respectively part.

nodes.label: Timestamp
nodes.description: Describes a Property which contains the date and time with an optional timezone.

nodes.label: StatusCharacteristic
nodes.description: Status describes the date when this aspect is filled, the according mileage and according operating hours.

nodes.label: LoaddataSourceCharacteristic
nodes.description: Information on the origin of the used load spectrum. If available, the link to the load spectrum.

nodes.label: SourceLoadSpectrum
nodes.description: Link to load spectrum

nodes.label: RemainingUsefulLife
nodes.description:
Remaining useful Life (RuL) describes the approximated life of a part, a component, an assembly, a vehicle. 
The approximation is based on the damage due to usage and extrapolation. 
remainingUsefulLife can be a procentual number, or expressed in remainingDistance or remaingOperationHours or remainingAge.

nodes.label: InformationOriginLoadSpectrumCharacteristic
nodes.preferredName: characteristic of origin of load spectrum
nodes.description: Origin of input load spectrum: measured, simulated, aggregated
